title: designRequirements
description: The list of requirements that a given capacitor must comply with. Built on top of the PEAS designRequirementsBase mixin (shared name/market/topology/operatingTemperature/terminalType/maximumWeight/maximumDimensions) plus capacitor-specific fields and a narrowed role enum. Closed via top-level unevaluatedProperties (the RAS pattern): base fields validate, unknown keys are rejected.

capacitance.description: Required values for the capacitance, in F

ratedVoltage.description: Minimum required rated DC voltage, in V

maximumEsr.description: Maximum allowed equivalent series resistance, in Ohm

minimumRippleCurrent.description: Minimum required rated ripple current, in A RMS

minimumLifetime.description: Minimum required lifetime under the declared operating points, in hours

role.description: Capacitor role in the converter. Used together with 'topology' to pick the correct stress and lifetime model.

allowedTechnologies.description: Subset of capacitor technologies acceptable for this design. If absent, all technologies are allowed. Items reference the SAME enum the part-side `technology` field uses (capacitor.json#/$defs/technology), so requirement and part vocabularies cannot drift apart.
